temples.name: Jageshwar Dham
temples.description: A historic group of Shiva temples at Jageshwar in Kumaon.
temples.dressCode: Warm, modest traditional dress recommended. Follow shrine-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Badrinath Temple
temples.description: A major Vishnu temple in the Garhwal Himalaya and one of the Char Dham shrines.
temples.dressCode: Warm, modest traditional dress recommended. Follow shrine-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Kedarnath Temple
temples.description: A high-Himalayan Shiva temple and one of the Char Dham pilgrimage shrines.
temples.dressCode: Warm, modest traditional dress recommended. Follow shrine-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Gangotri Temple

temples.name: Yamunotri Temple
temples.description: A Char Dham shrine dedicated to Goddess Yamuna, reached from Janki Chatti by trek or pony route.
temples.dressCode: Warm, modest traditional dress recommended. Follow shrine-specific rules at the entrance.
